creator: tagattie@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 202315
Patch

Updates adapta-gtk-theme to 3.95.0.11.
https://github.com/adapta-project/adapta-gtk-theme/releases/tag/3.95.0.11

Important changes since 3.91.2.152:
- Dropped Gtk+ 3.18.x support completely.
- Added Gtk+ 3.24 sources (Current our development focus is now 3.24 series).
- Added --enable-tweetdeck build option for "Colordeck for Tweetdeck" extension colour support.
- Changed autoconf default prefix from /usr to /usr/local (Configure.ac, autogen.sh, README.md).
